name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious child processes of a Windows shell and scripting processes such as wscript, rundll32, powershell, mshta...etc.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious child processes of a Windows shell and scripting processes such as wscript, rundll32, powershell, mshta...etc.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of [mshta.exe or powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or rundll32.exe or cscript.exe or wscript.exe or wmiprvse.exe or regsvr32.exe]
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [schtasks.exe or nslookup.exe or certutil.exe or bitsadmin.exe or mshta.exe]

when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\program files\amazon\workspacesconfig\scripts\setup-scheduledtask.ps1%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\program files\amazon\workspacesconfig\scripts\set-selfhealing.ps1%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\program files\amazon\workspacesconfig\scripts\check-workspacehealth.ps1%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\nessus_%') or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\nessus_%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of [mshta.exe or powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or rundll32.exe or cscript.exe or wscript.exe or wmiprvse.exe or regsvr32.exe]
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [schtasks.exe or nslookup.exe or certutil.exe or bitsadmin.exe or mshta.exe]

AND NOT when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\program files\amazon\workspacesconfig\scripts\setup-scheduledtask.ps1%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\program files\amazon\workspacesconfig\scripts\set-selfhealing.ps1%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\program files\amazon\workspacesconfig\scripts\check-workspacehealth.ps1%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\nessus_%') or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\nessus_%') AQL filter query
